svg.title: bistec-studio Entity Relationship Diagram
svg.desc: ERD for the Prisma data model: User, Project, Campaign, Brief, Draft, Post, two M:N join tables (ProjectCampaign, CampaignDraft), the BrandKit entity with BrandKitPrompt and BrandKitArtifact, and the AvailableProvider config table.
svg.text: Prisma schema · Project → Campaign → Brief → Draft → Post · BrandKit owns prompt + artifacts + Canva link

g.text: PK primary key · FK foreign key · ? nullable
1 —— ∞ one-to-many · Project/Campaign ⇄ BrandKit precedence: Campaign → Project → default
